rulings.Case Title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. ANDRES SUAY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Enforcement Of Settlement Agreement And Order Plaintiff To Start Over For Violating Terms Of The Agreement With Default Award
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 23, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT ANN LEMBERG's Motion For Enforcement Of Settlement Agreement And Order Plaintiff To Start Over For Violating Terms Of The Agreement With Default Award DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1300(c); 3.1112 and 3.1113. Additionally, there is a judgment on file.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. ANDRES SUAY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 23, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT ANN LEMBERG Motion To Vacate Judgment DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1300(c); 3.1112 and 3.1113. Additionally, moving party failed to sustain burden.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JG HIDALGO REMODELING, LLC, VS. LAURA VASQUEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 23, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANTs LAURA VASQUEZ, CHENOA CARHART, and EDGAR TORRES's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Action CUD-16-654492 dismissed on March 1, 2017. Plaintiff and its counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future. Failure to comply with result the motion being taken off calendar/treated as unopposed.= (501/REQ)
